---
title: "1. Foundations of Data Analysis for Operations Research"
---

## Why Data Analysis Matters in OR

Before optimizing, we must understand and prepare our data.

```python
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

# Sample dataset for demonstration
data = {
    'product': ['A', 'B', 'C', 'D'],
    'demand': [150, 200, 120, 180],
    'cost': [12.5, 15.0, 10.8, 14.2],
    'lead_time': [5, 3, 7, 4],
    'capacity': [300, 400, 250, 350]
}

df = pd.DataFrame(data)

print("Shape:", df.shape)
display(df.head())
display(df.describe())
